changelog:
QUANTUM ACK V5.3:
- [COMMS] The ACK Protocol: Introduced a decentralized, silent read-receipt system for E2E Direct Messages with real-time [ SENT ] and [ READ ] UI indicators.
- [UI] Control Room Overhaul: Centralized Bunker Mode toggle and Change Master Passcode functionality into a single dashboard.
- [SYSTEM] Smart OTA & UI Polish: Updater now autonomously detects local versions. Improved Sonar UI to dynamically decrement and clean up notification alerts after decryption.
